title: AsTimeStealSMP
description: A unique SMP plugin where time is life ⏳ Kill players to steal their time, survive as long as you can, and run out of time = RIP!
body:
# ⏳ AsTimeStealSMP

**Time is Life. Run out of time = RIP.**
A unique SMP plugin that changes the way you play Minecraft — your **life is measured in time**.
Every action matters. Survive, fight, and steal time from others to stay alive!

---

## ⚡ Features

* ⏳ **Starting Time** → Players start with 24 hours (configurable).
* ⚔️ **Kill To Gain Time** → Every kill rewards bonus minutes (default: +30m).
* 📜 **Fully Configurable** → Edit `config.yml` for starting time, time on kill, shrines, and timeout actions.
* 🕹 **Action Bar Timer** → See your remaining time displayed permanently in the action bar.
* 🎁 **Daily Rewards** → Login bonuses + streak system to keep players active.
* ⛏ **Shrine Sacrifices** → Trade rare items (like Diamonds, Nether Stars, Dragon Eggs) for extra time.
* ☠️ **Timeout Actions** → Choose what happens when time runs out: `BAN`, `SPECTATOR`, or `KICK`.

---

## 🔧 Configuration

The plugin comes with a detailed `config.yml` for maximum customization:

```yaml
# 🕰 Starting time for new players (in minutes)
starting-time: 1440   # 24 hours

# ⚔️ Time gained per player kill
time-on-kill: 30

# 🎁 Daily login bonus (in minutes)
daily-bonus: 60

# 🔥 Streak bonus (extra reward for login streaks)
streak-bonus: 120
streak-days: 5

# ☠️ On timeout: BAN | SPECTATOR | KICK
on-timeout: "BAN"

# 🌍 Shrine sacrifices (trade items for more time)
shrines:
  DIAMOND_BLOCK: 10
  NETHER_STAR: 120
  DRAGON_EGG: 1440
```

---

## 📜 Commands

* `/astimestealsmp info` → Show plugin info.
* `/astimestealsmp reload` → Reload the config.
* `/astimestealsmp timeleft` → Check your remaining time.
* `/astimestealsmp timeout <player>` → View another player’s time.

---

## 📡 Support

👨‍💻 Made by: **ItzAzeem**
💬 Discord: `itzazeem.as`
🌍 Support Server: [Join Here](https://discord.gg/xRW5rdAvs5)

---

🔥 **Survive the ticking clock, fight to steal time, and outlast everyone in AsTimeStealSMP!**
